mapper.insert: INSERT INTO daily_log (cycle_seq_no, member_seq_no, todo_ymd) VALUES (#{cycleSeqNo}, #{memberSeqNo}, #{todoYmd})
mapper.select:
SELECT r.title,
FROM daily_log dl INNER JOIN routine_cycle rc ON dl.cycle_seq_no = rc.seq_no INNER JOIN routine r ON rc.routine_seq_no = r.seq_no WHERE dl.member_seq_no = #{memberSeqNo} AND dl.todo_ymd = #{todoYmd}
